question: What is the effect of drinking water from the sacred spring located in the ancient Elderwood forest.?

answers.ground_truth: It amplifies the mental abilities of those who drink it.
answers.original: I do not have enough information to answer.

ops.description: Animus Cores contain remnants of powerful spirits, providing them with magical energy.<SEP>Animus Cores contain remnants of powerful spirits, providing magical energy.

entities.name: Ancient Trees
entities.description: Ancient trees are part of the Elderwood Forest and contribute to its sacred atmosphere.

entities.name: Elderwood Forest
entities.description: Elderwood Forest is an ancient forest that houses the Font of Resonance and many ancient trees.<SEP>Elderwood Forest is a forest near Aethelgard where the ruling council meets.<SEP>Elderwood Forest is where the ruling council of Eldoria meets.<SEP>Elderwood Forest is an ancient forest that houses the Font of Resonance and other natural features.

entities.name: Verdant Forests
entities.description: Verdant forests are home to ancient tree-spirits and are protected by Grove-Keepers.
